Related Entities

  • hospital WELLSPAN WAYNESBORO HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • hospital WELLSPAN CHAMBERSBURG HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • snf BROOKVIEW HEALTH CARE CENTER 4-star, 56 beds
  • snf CHAMBERSBURG SKILLED NURSING AND REHABILITATION CE 3-star, 210 beds
  • snf QUINCY RETIREMENT COMMUNITY 3-star, 94 beds
  • snf SOUTH MOUNTAIN RESTORATION CEN 5-star, 159 beds
  • snf LAUREL LAKES REHABILITATION AND WELLNESS CENTER 1-star, 186 beds
  • snf PARAMOUNT NURSING AND REHAB AT FAYETTEVILLE, LLC 1-star, 92 beds
  • snf TRANSITIONS HEALTHCARE SHOOK HOME 1-star, 65 beds
  • snf CHAMBERS POINTE HEALTH CARE CENTER 3-star, 50 beds
  • snf MENNO HAVEN REHABILITATION CENTER 5-star, 44 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
